user_story: As a Manager, I want to submit a salary revision for an employee, so that their compensation change can be reviewed and approved
acceptance_criteria: Given a salary revision is Pending submission; When I complete and submit it; Then its status changes to Pending approval

user_story: As an approver, I want to approve a salary revision or request clarification, so that I can control compensation changes
acceptance_criteria: Given a salary revision is Pending approval; When I open its Task; Then I can approve it or set it to Need clarification

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter salary revisions by status and department, so that I can track items in a workflow stage or team
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Salary Revision screen; When I select a status and a department; Then only matching revisions are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter revisions by active or inactive employees and by period, so that I can scope the list appropriately
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Salary Revision screen; When I choose Active or Inactive employees and a From and To period; Then only matching revisions are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see the revision period and revision due date for each employee, so that I can act on revisions on time
acceptance_criteria: Given salary revisions are listed; When I view a row; Then I can see the employee, department, position, revision period, and revision due date

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search and reset the salary revision list, so that I can refine or clear my query
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then matching records are displayed; And clicking Reset clears the filters
